name: XCL World Academy
tagline: Future-focused IB education preparing students for tomorrow
description: XCL World Academy (formerly GEMS World Academy Singapore) offers the full IB continuum from Nursery through Grade 12. Located in Yishun in the north of Singapore, XCL sits on a purpose-built campus with state-of-the-art facilities including an innovation hub, recording studios, and an esports arena. The school emphasizes future-ready skills — critical thinking, collaboration, and adaptability — alongside strong academics. XCL is the only international school in Singapore to offer all four IB programmes: PYP, MYP, DP, and the IB Career-related Programme (CP).

admission.process: XCL accepts applications year-round. After submitting an online application, families are invited for a campus tour and student assessment.
admission.deadlines: Rolling admissions throughout the year with flexible start dates.
admission.assessmentInfo: Age-appropriate placement assessments. EAL support available for non-native English speakers.

faqs.question: What IB programmes does XCL offer?
faqs.answer: XCL is the only school in Singapore offering all four IB programmes: PYP, MYP, DP, and the Career-related Programme (CP), providing multiple pathways for students.

faqs.question: What is XCL's approach to education?
faqs.answer: XCL emphasizes future-focused learning — developing skills like critical thinking, creativity, and adaptability alongside traditional academics. The curriculum is inquiry-based with technology integration.
